title: Blue Canyon Artemis Shower Head, High-Pressure Water Flow, Premium Plastic Shower Head for Bath with Anti-Blocking Nozzles, Customised Bathing with 3 Mode Shower Spray, Easy to Install and Clean
features: 【 HIGH-PRESSURE FLOW 】: Have a high-flow refreshing shower bath with the Blue Canyon Artemis shower & be all set for the day! A powerful shower head with anti-clog pores provides a better bath time, as a pressure-boosting shower has a massaging effect that calms a tired body.

【 PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIAL 】: The high-quality plastic used in the Artemis shower head makes it sturdy & durable. The shower head design is made such that it suits every interior bath design & looks elegant while giving the utmost relaxing & pleasuring shower experience.

【 3 SPRAY MODES 】: Get your shower personalised! Our Artemis Shower head comprises 3 different mode settings- Spray, Spray & Massage, and Massage. Choose the mode that suits you best & enjoy your bath time to the fullest. Hurry up & customise your showering asap!

【 UNIVERSAL FITTING 】: The shower head universally fits most shower arms. No more high plumber costs and you don’t need to buy any tools for installation, too; it installs in minutes with just one hand-tighten connection.

【 EASY TO CLEAN 】: The leakproof shower head is easy to clean; you don’t need a specialised tool for cleaning & it’s lightweight too, which makes it convenient to clean, so clean it on your own. Just wipe it with a cloth or sponge. Extremely simple!
